title: ALLCPR Smart Manikin — step-by-step operational workflows
description: Ordered tutorials converted from the curated SOP_library. Each step is Step N with instructions, evidence, an if-problem branch, and do-not rules, so a staff member knows the order, what to check, what to do if something is missing/broken, when to report to ALLCPR, and what NOT to do. Images support steps but never replace them. No raw passcodes appear here.

workflows.title_zh: Smart Manikin 完整分点巡检
source_files: SOP_library/01_Core_SOPs/Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx
workflows.record_form: Weekly Site Check Report / 每周分点巡检表

steps.title_en: Arrive and pause before touching anything
steps.title_zh: 到达后先不要移动或清洁任何东西
instructions_en: Do not clean, move, fix, or organize anything yet.
First observe the whole room and the Smart Manikin station.
Get ready to capture before photos — the site must be photographed in its found state.
instructions_zh: 先不要清洁、搬动、修理或整理任何东西。
先观察整个房间和 Smart Manikin 训练站。
准备拍摄巡检前照片——必须先记录现场的原始状态。
if_problem: If the room is unsafe (water/electric hazard, fire, injury), stop and follow the safety/emergency step first, then report to ALLCPR.
do_not: Do not clean, move, or organize before the before photos are taken.
Do not start repairs.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · pre_check_photos / acknowledgement

instructions_en: Before any cleaning or organizing, take site photos.
Whole room
Smart Manikin area
Supplies / consumables area
Door or signage
Abnormal / problem area, if any
instructions_zh: 在开始清洁或整理前，先拍现场照片。
整个房间
Smart Manikin 区域
耗材 / 用品区域
门或路牌/指示牌
异常 / 问题区域（如有）
evidence_required: Before photo: any abnormal / problem area
if_problem: If you cannot safely photograph an area, note why and continue; do not enter an unsafe area for a photo.
do_not: Do not use old photos or staged/replacement photos.
Do not clean or move anything before these photos are taken.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · pre_check_photos

steps.title_zh: 桌面 / 训练站预检查
instructions_en: Before moving anything, check what is present on the table/station and compare it with the standard placement reference (page-3 diagram).
iPad present
Smart Manikin / manikins present
AED Training Pads present
Consumables area present
Tissues / simulated gauze present if supplied
Disinfecting wipes present
Disposable gloves present
Mask adaptors present
Face shield present if supplied / optional
Pocket Mask present
BVM / Bag-Valve-Mask present
iPad connected to power
Smart Manikin connected to power
Items in standard placement / not scattered
instructions_zh: 移动任何东西前，先检查桌面/训练站上有哪些物品，并与标准摆放参考（第 3 页图）对比。
iPad 在现场
Smart Manikin / 假人在现场
AED Training Pads 在现场
耗材区域在现场
纸巾 / 模拟纱布如有配置应在现场
消毒湿巾在现场
一次性手套在现场
Mask adaptors 在现场
Face shield 如有配置应在现场
Pocket Mask 在现场
BVM / 球囊面罩在现场
iPad 已连接电源
Smart Manikin 已连接电源
物品按标准位置摆放，没有明显散乱
evidence_required: For each item: mark Present / Missing / Problem
Photo of any missing or problem item, if safe
if_problem: Mark the item Missing or Problem.
Take a photo if safe.
Write a short note.
Include it in the Weekly Site Check Report.
Report to ALLCPR if it cannot be fixed on site.
do_not: Do not invent a replacement or a repair.
Do not dismantle or repair the Smart Manikin / iPad.
Do not treat the placement diagram as repair instructions.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · equipment_placement / site_checklist

instructions_en: Check overall hygiene and site cleanliness.
Empty the trash can and replace the trash bag if needed.
Keep the floor clean; clear visible mess.
Record the status — do not rely only on the photo.
instructions_zh: 检查整体卫生与现场清洁。
倒空垃圾桶，必要时更换垃圾袋。
保持地面干净，清理可见杂物。
记录状态——不要只依赖照片。
if_problem: If cleaning cannot be completed on site, note it and include in the report.
do_not: Do not skip recording just because you cleaned it.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · site_checklist (hygiene, trash)

instructions_en: Confirm disinfecting supplies are enough for one week.
Disinfect all teaching equipment.
Note any low or missing consumables (wipes, gloves, mask adaptors).
instructions_zh: 确认消毒用品够用一周。
对所有教学设备进行消毒。
记录不足或缺失的耗材（湿巾、手套、面罩转接头）。
if_problem: Mark low/missing supplies and include restock need in the report; report to ALLCPR if you cannot restock on site.
do_not: Do not make a student responsible for staff disinfection or restocking.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · site_checklist (disinfection)

instructions_en: Check Smart Manikin, iPad, AED Pads, BVM, Pocket Mask are complete and normal.
Confirm the iPad and Smart Manikin are connected to power cables.
Confirm equipment is placed in the standard position.
instructions_zh: 检查 Smart Manikin、iPad、AED Pads、BVM、Pocket Mask 是否齐全且正常。
确认 iPad 与 Smart Manikin 已连接电源线。
确认设备摆放在标准位置。
if_problem: If a device is broken or unresponsive, take a photo, note the symptom, and report to ALLCPR.
do_not: Do not dismantle or repair the Smart Manikin, iPad, camera, or access control.
Do not improvise an undocumented reset or calibration step.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · site_checklist (equipment, power) / do_not_repair

steps.title_en: Access, camera, Wi-Fi, signage, and safety check
steps.title_zh: 门禁、摄像头、Wi-Fi、路牌与安全检查
instructions_en: Check door access, Lockbox, or Access Code are normal (do not expose codes in the workflow; staff unlock internal access only when needed).
Confirm the camera is online.
Confirm Wi-Fi is normal.
Check signs are complete and clear.
Check for visible water/electric/equipment safety hazards.
instructions_zh: 检查门禁、Lockbox 或 Access Code 是否正常（流程中不显示密码；员工仅在需要时解锁内部权限）。
确认摄像头在线。
确认 Wi-Fi 正常。
检查指示牌/路牌是否完整清晰。
检查可见的水/电/设备安全隐患。
if_problem: If there is a safety concern, stop and avoid unsafe use, then report to ALLCPR.
If access fails, contact venue/property and record attempts; escalate if class is delayed.
do_not: Do not force a door or guess passcodes.
Do not share access codes outside internal operations.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · site_checklist (access, camera, network, signage, safety)

steps.title_en: Fix only safe, simple on-site issues
steps.title_zh: 只处理安全、简单的现场问题
instructions_en: If an issue can be safely fixed on site, fix it and document what you did.
If it cannot be fixed on site, take photos and report to ALLCPR promptly.
instructions_zh: 如果问题可以安全地现场解决，处理并记录你做了什么。
如果无法现场解决，拍照并及时上报 ALLCPR。
if_problem: If not fixable on site, photograph it, note it, and report to ALLCPR.
do_not: Do not dismantle or repair the Smart Manikin, iPad, camera, or access control.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · on_site_handling / do_not_repair

instructions_en: After all inspection and cleaning is complete, take site photos again.
Keep photo angles as consistent as possible with the before photos.
Whole room
Smart Manikin area
Supplies / consumables area
Door or signage
If an issue was fixed, take a photo of the corrected result.
instructions_zh: 完成所有巡检与清洁整理后，再次拍现场照片。
拍照角度尽量与巡检前照片一致。
整个房间
Smart Manikin 区域
耗材 / 用品区域
门或路牌/指示牌
如果处理了问题，拍一张修复结果照片。
evidence_required: After photo: fixed-issue result, if any
if_problem: If an area still has an unresolved issue, keep the problem photo for the report.
do_not: Do not use old or staged photos.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · post_check_photos

steps.title_en: Complete the Weekly Site Check Report
instructions_en: Site check result
Problems found
Actions taken
Whether ALLCPR support is needed
Everything must be truthful and complete.
instructions_zh: 现场检查结果
发现的问题
已采取的处理
是否需要 ALLCPR 支持
所有内容必须真实、完整。
if_problem: Record any unresolved problem and mark that ALLCPR support is needed.
do_not: Do not leave the report incomplete or enter false information.
steps.source_ref: ICPIS Weekly Site Check Report.docx · weekly_site_check_report

instructions_en: Upload to the corresponding site Google Drive folder.
Before photos
After photos
Completed Weekly Site Check Report
Issue photos, if any
Recommended: same day after inspection.
instructions_zh: 上传到对应分点的 Google Drive 文件夹。
巡检前照片
巡检后照片
已填写的每周分点巡检表
问题照片（如有）
建议：巡检当天完成上传。
if_problem: If upload fails, retry and note the delay; do not skip the upload.
do_not: Do not upload old or staged photos.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · upload_materials

instructions_en: completed — if no unresolved issue remains.
needs_support — if an unresolved issue remains.
safety_escalation — if there is a safety issue.
Include the missing/problem counts.
instructions_zh: completed —— 若没有未解决问题。
needs_support —— 若存在未解决问题。
safety_escalation —— 若存在安全问题。
包含缺失/问题数量。
evidence_required: Final status recorded with missing/problem counts
if_problem: Any unresolved or safety issue must escalate to ALLCPR, not close silently.
do_not: Do not mark completed while an unresolved or safety issue remains.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx · weekly_site_check_report / on_site_handling

source_files: SOP_library/01_Core_SOPs/Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx

instructions_en: Check whether you can enter the class area.
instructions_zh: 检查你是否能进入上课区域。
if_problem: Report that you cannot enter; add site and class time. Photo of the entrance if safe.
do_not: Do not force entry or use staff-only access.
steps.source_ref: quick class readiness (report-only, source-safe subset)

steps.title_en: Check if the room looks safe and usable
steps.title_zh: 检查房间是否安全可用
instructions_en: Check whether the room looks safe and usable.
instructions_zh: 检查房间看起来是否安全可用。
if_problem: Report an unsafe/messy/blocked room or a water/electrical concern; photo if safe.
do_not: Do not touch hazards.
steps.source_ref: quick class readiness (report-only, source-safe subset)

steps.title_en: Check if the Smart Manikin / iPad station is visible
steps.title_zh: 检查是否能看到 Smart Manikin / iPad 训练站
instructions_en: Check whether you can see the Smart Manikin / iPad training station.
instructions_zh: 检查你是否能看到 Smart Manikin / iPad 训练站。
if_problem: Report if it is missing or not set up; photo if safe.
do_not: Do not move equipment around.
steps.source_ref: quick class readiness (report-only, source-safe subset)

steps.title_en: Check if the iPad / app opens
steps.title_zh: 检查 iPad / 应用是否能打开
instructions_en: Check whether the iPad/app opens normally.
instructions_zh: 检查 iPad/应用是否能正常打开。
if_problem: Report a black screen / not opening / no response.
do_not: Do not reset, repair, or dismantle equipment.
steps.source_ref: quick class readiness (report-only, source-safe subset)

steps.title_en: Check if the Smart Manikin appears connected / usable
steps.title_zh: 检查 Smart Manikin 是否已连接 / 可用
instructions_en: Check whether the Smart Manikin appears connected and usable.
instructions_zh: 检查 Smart Manikin 是否已连接且可用。
if_problem: Report a Bluetooth / connection / data problem.
do_not: Do not repair or dismantle.
steps.source_ref: quick class readiness (report-only, source-safe subset)

steps.title_en: Report any missing / dirty / broken visible issue
steps.title_zh: 报告任何缺失 / 脏乱 / 损坏的可见问题
instructions_en: Report anything visibly missing, dirty, damaged, or wrong.
instructions_zh: 报告任何明显缺失、脏乱、损坏或不对的问题。
if_problem: Describe what is wrong; photo/video only if safe.
do_not: Do not perform staff maintenance unless instructed.
steps.source_ref: quick class readiness (report-only, source-safe subset)

instructions_en: Submit the quick report for staff review.
instructions_zh: 提交快速报告，交由员工审核。
if_problem: A safety concern is submitted as a safety escalation; stop using the area if unsafe.
do_not: Do not include Weekly Site Check Report, Google Drive upload, passcodes, or repair steps.
steps.source_ref: quick class readiness (report-only, source-safe subset)

workflows.title_zh: Smart Manikin 新点考察（参考）
source_files: SOP_library/01_Core_SOPs/Smart Manikins 新地点开发 SOP.docx
SOP_library/02_Forms_and_Templates/SMART MANIKIN SITE FIELD ASSESSMENT FORM.pdf
SOP_library/02_Forms_and_Templates/新点审批 邮件申请模版.docx

instructions_en: Record basic info: address, building, floor, room, contact, and commercial terms.
instructions_zh: 记录基本信息：地址、楼栋、楼层、房间、联系人与商务条件。
if_problem: If key info is missing, mark Need-info and do not score yet.
do_not: Do not self-approve anything affecting cost, liability, contract, insurance, safety, or operations.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikins 新地点开发 SOP.docx · 现场考察表

steps.title_en: Assess access, parking, room, visibility, power, network, safety
steps.title_zh: 评估门禁、停车、房间、可见度、供电、网络、安全
instructions_en: Assess accessibility/parking, room/infrastructure, visibility/signage, power, and network.
Apply the hard-elimination gate: access control not installable, camera not installable, network not adequate, unfixable blind spot, or high safety risk.
instructions_zh: 评估可达性/停车、房间/基础设施、可见度/指示、供电与网络。
应用硬性淘汰条件：门禁无法安装、摄像头无法安装、网络不足、无法消除的盲区或高安全风险。
if_problem: If any hard-elimination condition is met, mark Reject and stop.
do_not: Do not score around a hard-elimination condition.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 选址评分表.xlsm · hard-elimination gate

steps.title_en: Score the site and collect evidence
steps.title_zh: 为场地评分并收集证据
instructions_en: Fill the site-selection scoring sheet within 24h and collect photos/video for the submission packet.
Decision bands: >=85 Priority Candidate; 75-84.9 Management Review; 65-74.9 Hold/Compare; <65 Reject.
instructions_zh: 24 小时内填写选址评分表，并为提交包收集照片/视频。
决策区间：>=85 优先候选；75-84.9 管理层审核；65-74.9 观望/比较；<65 拒绝。
evidence_required: Photos/video in the site funnel (场地漏斗) folder
if_problem: If the score is borderline, route to Management Review rather than deciding.
do_not: Do not skip the submission packet standard.
steps.source_ref: Smart Manikin 选址评分表.xlsm · decision bands

instructions_en: Submit to BD review, then management approval.
Use the new-site approval email template for the approval request.
instructions_zh: 提交 BD 复核，再由管理层审批。
使用新点审批邮件模板提交审批申请。
if_problem: Anything touching cost/lease/insurance/safety escalates to management; staff do not self-approve.
do_not: Do not promise a lease, payment, or opening date before approval.
steps.source_ref: 新点审批 邮件申请模版.docx · approval workflow

source_files: SOP_library/04_Policies/Mileage Reimbursement Policy for ALLCPR Instructor.docx

instructions_en: Submit the Business Trip Request form.
instructions_zh: 提交出差申请表。
do_not: Do not book before approval.
steps.source_ref: Short Term Business Trip SOP.docx

instructions_en: Record the approval decision.
instructions_zh: 记录审批结论。
do_not: Do not self-approve.
steps.source_ref: Short Term Business Trip SOP.docx

steps.title_zh: 准备行程与出发前清单
instructions_en: Complete the itinerary and pre-trip checklist.
instructions_zh: 完成行程与出发前准备清单。
steps.source_ref: Short Term Business Trip SOP.docx

instructions_en: Log daily activity and keep evidence.
instructions_zh: 记录每日执行并保留证据。
steps.source_ref: Short Term Business Trip SOP.docx

instructions_en: Complete the trip report.
instructions_zh: 完成出差总结报告。
steps.source_ref: Short Term Business Trip SOP.docx

instructions_en: Assemble the expense package; apply the mileage reimbursement policy.
instructions_zh: 整理费用报销包；适用里程报销政策。
do_not: Do not claim outside policy.
steps.source_ref: Short Term Business Trip SOP.docx · Mileage Reimbursement Policy

instructions_en: Complete the follow-up action list.
instructions_zh: 完成出差后续行动清单。
steps.source_ref: Short Term Business Trip SOP.docx

image_references.source_file: SOP_library/01_Core_SOPs/Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx (page 3)
image_references.what_it_shows: The standard Smart Manikin table/station placement: iPad, manikins, AED Training Pads, consumables, Pocket Mask, and BVM in their standard positions (source-backed labels only; no image analysis).
image_references.when_to_show: During the Table / Station Pre-check and equipment placement steps of the full site inspection.
image_references.what_user_should_compare: Compare the actual station against the standard placement before moving anything; check each item is present and in its standard position.
image_references.caution_notes: Reference only; do not repair or dismantle equipment. If the picture does not match the actual site, mark the item Missing/Problem, photograph it, note it, and report to ALLCPR — do not rearrange to force a match beyond standard placement.
